notes:
v2_88: fix bootstrap-update pack detection under pipefail; add strict preflight+postflight in bootstrap-apply; installer now installs bootstrap-update/apply wrappers. | v2_90: fixed systemd gate (pack vs system), added smoketest, hardened /run/aevum runtime creation.
- v2_91: Fix bootstrap apply script (idempotent install + correct systemd gate). Add optional auto-apply after update (AEVUM_BOOTSTRAP_APPLY=1). Identity bootstrap now repairs bad identity self-signature using existing key.
- v2_91: tmpfiles uses root:root for /run/aevum to avoid missing group early.

[2026-02-09] v2_93: Bundle-aware update/apply pipeline (3-zip contract), operator modes (install/maintenance/locked/estop), and staging bundle manifest.
v2_96: canonicalization + controlplane minimization; move systemd-executed scripts to usr/local/sbin; remove bootkit-owned operator commands from bootstrap pack; regenerate release cone required paths.
